overview: Genesys Men's Health specializes in testosterone replacement therapy using bioidentical hormones administered as customized creams or injectables. The clinic takes an individualized approach and specializes in difficult cases that traditional medicine has not adequately addressed.
highlights: Difficult case specialization (fibromyalgia, chronic fatigue syndrome)
targetAudience: Men of all ages with low testosterone, particularly those with difficult cases that traditional approaches haven't resolved.
